# Reference

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
using AustralianElectricityMarkets
using Markdown

# Iterate over exported names
for name in names(AustralianElectricityMarkets)
    name == :AustralianElectricityMarkets && continue

    # Get the docstring
    doc = Base.Docs.doc(Base.Docs.Binding(AustralianElectricityMarkets, name))

    # Only print if it has a docstring (and it's not the empty one)
    if !isempty(string(doc))
        println("## `$(name)`")
        println("")
        println(doc)
        println("")
        println("---")
        println("")
    end
end
```
